title: LEFT/RIGHT OUTER JOIN Algorithm Verification
description: 证明LEFT/RIGHT OUTER JOIN算法的正确性：嵌套循环外连接算法正确处理null标记，所有左结果行有side=1，所有右结果行有side=2，左缓冲区为空时left_result有Exactly LeftSize条目，右缓冲区为空时right_result有Exactly RightSize条目，left_result无重复id，right_result无重复id。

invariants_verified: SideInvariant: All left_result rows have side=1, all right_result rows have side=2
LeftDone: Left buffer empty implies left_result has exactly LeftSize entries
RightDone: Right buffer empty implies right_result has exactly RightSize entries
LeftUnique: No duplicate ids in left_result
RightUnique: No duplicate ids in right_result

author: openclaw
